mapper.sql: ID, TYPE, STATUS, PROGRESS, TOTAL_ROWS, SUCCESS_ROWS, FAILED_ROWS, ERROR_SUMMARY, RESULT_URL, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APP_EXCEL_TASKS ( ID, TYPE, STATUS, PROGRESS, TOTAL_ROWS, SUCCESS_ROWS, FAILED_ROWS, ERROR_SUMMARY, RESULT_URL, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{progress, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{totalRows, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{successRows, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{failedRows, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{errorSummary, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{resultUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE APP_EXCEL_TASKS SET STATUS = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, PROGRESS = #{progress, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, TOTAL_ROWS = #{totalRows, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SUCCESS_ROWS = #{successRows, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, FAILED_ROWS = #{failedRows, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ERROR_SUMMARY = #{errorSummary, jdbcType=CLOB}, RESULT_URL = #{resultUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
